title: conostylis tomentosa
intro: Conostylis tomentosa, also known as the woolly triggerplant or woolly trigger, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haemodoraceae. This Australian native plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Conostylis tomentosa include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and calm digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
